Name: Occasions how often the Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation is the only submission in a case
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities grouped by the last value of code filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation per case
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities grouped by the last value of code

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation done after Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'Co-Author Account Created During Manuscript Submission'

Name: Total Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation performed in cases with reviewer invitation reminders
Metric: Number of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: The ratio of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that are not followed by a revised submission
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all cases where 'Revised Manuscript Submission Confirmation' does not happen

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation in cases that undergo major revision (SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Number of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation grouped by case outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Major Revision, RW-EIC Accept)
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'aggregation': 'total', 'filter': '', 'group_by': 'concept:name', 'metric_condition': ''}"

Name: Percentage of Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation that is the first event in a case
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'metric_condition': '> 0', 'aggregation': 'percentage', 'filter': "activity == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'", 'group_by': 'case:concept:name'}"
